question: [File: 'File Name: rosetta/main.go -> Scope: Medium: Increasing network processing node resource consumption by at least 30% without brute force actions, compared to the preceding 24 hours'] [Function: newBlockchainOnlineRouter()] Can an unprivileged external user send repeated POST requests to /block with a valid but high-index block identifier, causing blockAPIService.Block() to invoke FindBetween() with a wide consensus timestamp range, triggering batched DB queries in a loop and increasing DB CPU and I/O consumption by over 30% compared to baseline?
